title: Passing Time With Richard Linklater | The Big Picture (Ep. 33)
format: Sean Fennessey talks to Richard Linklater about Last Flag Flying, his twentieth film, why the passage of time keeps coming back into his work, and the industry reckoning over sexual harassment.

films.title: Last Flag Flying
films.note: His new film: Steve Carell, Bryan Cranston, and Laurence Fishburne as three Vietnam-era friends who reunite in 2003 to bring Carell's son's body home from Iraq. Adapted from Daryl Ponicsan's novel, which he first read in 2005.

films.title: Dazed and Confused
films.note: Named in the intro as one of his talky, single-day movies, set on the last day of school.

films.title: Before Sunrise
films.note: The other intro touchstone; he and his co-stars keep circling a fourth Before film roughly every nine years without landing on the idea.

films.title: Boyhood
films.note: The third intro touchstone, shot over twelve years; comes up again as an idea he sat with for a decade before making it.

films.title: Born on the Fourth of July
films.note: His pick for a genuine anti-war movie, credited to Oliver Stone actually having fought in Vietnam.

films.title: Everybody Wants Some!!
films.note: The film right before this one, a spiritual sequel to Dazed and Confused. Paramount financed it but barely released it; he says people keep discovering it a year or two late.

films.title: A Scanner Darkly
films.note: Cited alongside Boyhood as proof he's found ways to make ambitious, unconventional films on a modest budget.

films.title: Me and Orson Welles
films.note: Shot in London with an international cast, set backstage at Orson Welles's 1937 Mercury Theatre. Another one he loves that got buried by bad distribution.

films.title: Bernie
films.note: His example of the backhanded compliment: a fan mentioning they just caught it on Showtime, years after the fact.

films.title: The Dead
films.note: John Huston's final film, which Linklater is showing in his own film society retrospective. Huston made it while on oxygen for emphysema.

Born on the Fourth of July.title: Born on the Fourth of July
